tcrDescription: Prototype Curate list for ERC-8004 agent attestations. Testnet only. Items reference an agentId in GiskardIdentityRegistry on Arbitrum One and attest to a specific action by that agent.

columns.label: actionHash
columns.description: keccak256 hash of the action being attested

columns.label: evidenceURI
columns.description: Public URI with evidence supporting the attestation

columns.label: attestorAgentId
columns.description: agentId of the attestor (the agent vouching for the action)
